name: Carne Asado (Mexican Style Beef Tips & Gravy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sort through the stew meat and trim excess fat and gristle.
2. Cut into 1-inch pieces if necessary.
3. In a medium-sized, heavy bottom pot, add enough bacon drippings or melted lard to cover the bottom.
4. Place the stew meat in the pot and sauté until lightly browned.
5. Add water to cover and 2-3 tablespoons of beef bouillon, cumin, pepper, and tomato sauce. Cover.
6. Simmer on low heat until the meat is tender (about 1 hour).
7. Toward the end of cooking time, add flour to thicken the gravy and continue simmering, stirring occasionally for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Remove from heat and serve with Spanish rice (Sopa de Arroz) and refried beans.
9. Salsa cruda, Pico de Gallo, coarsely chopped lettuce, tomatoes, and shredded cheddar cheese are good garnishes.
10. Serve with warm flour tortillas or make soft tacos.
